errors.msg: GAN WebSocket to sir:8060 — 2222 errors (Connect Timeout + trustAnchors empty)
errors.fix: Remove sir from GAN config or bring sir gateway online
Cosmetic — occurs during restart, not actionable
Shapes module not installed — remove pipe components from PID view or install module
Designer discovery multicast — normal if no other gateways on LAN
Time series chart not in Maker — use basic chart or remove component

errors.msg: Could not convert Float8 to valid Data Type
errors.fix: Use Float4 or Double instead of Float8 in nodeconfig.json
Maker has no REST tag API
Use PostMessage for bg ops
Designer publish required
Wait for window title match
Open Designer + Ctrl+S
Run as admin
Click AGREE via Playwright
clickAt x2 80ms apart
Use filesystem or Designer
Scan 5555-5585 range

errors.msg: Unable to parse PagesConfig — Expected BEGIN_ARRAY but was BEGIN_OBJECT at $.right
errors.fix: sharedDocks right value must be array not object in page-config

errors.msg: GAN WebSocket to sir:8060 connection timeout
errors.fix: Remote gateway sir is offline — expected if not on network
